description_long: This is a stylish pair of eyeglasses featuring a semi-rimless design with a prominent, flat top frame in a striking blue color. The lenses are rectangular with rounded edges, held in place by a thin metal structure that extends to slender temples. The temples are straight and thin, with a subtle curve at the ends for a secure fit behind the ears. The bridge is equipped with adjustable nose pads for comfort and stability. Decorative rivets are visible at the upper corners of the frame, adding a touch of sophistication. The overall design is modern and urban, suitable for everyday wear in city environments.
description: A modern, semi-rimless pair of eyeglasses with a blue top frame, rectangular lenses, and thin, straight temples. Features include adjustable nose pads and decorative rivets.
description_view_0: Front view showing the blue semi-rimless top frame, rectangular lenses, and decorative rivets at the corners.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin, straight temple and the profile of the adjustable nose pads.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curvature of the temples and the open, semi-rimless lower lens area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other temple and the side profile of the frame and nose pads.
attribute_frame_design: The frame has a semi-rimless, rectangular geometry with a flat, bold top bar and thin, straight temples. The upper rim is prominent while the lower part of the lenses is rimless, giving a lightweight and modern appearance. Decorative rivets are present at the upper corners, and the temples are slender with a gentle curve at the ends.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are clear and transparent with no visible tint, gradient, or special effects.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a thin metal bar with adjustable nose pads, providing both support and comfort. The nose pads are attached to the bridge and are clearly visible from the front and side views.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thin and straight with a slight curve at the tips. They appear to be free of engravings or patterns, maintaining a minimalist and sleek design.
